calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar May-26-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Sep-07-2024 is admitted to probate. Peter Daniel Lee is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May-26-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Personal Representative shall file either a petition for order for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. Code Sec.12200 et seq. two weeks before the hearing date.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Thompson. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2025 Continued To May-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
